meaning: n.斯科奇加德防油防水剂(用于织物、绒面革、皮革等)
examples: Its profitable Scotchgard grew from a laboratory accident that spilled slime all over somebody's shoe.
The company expects to develop branding for its Sol-Gel product in the same way that 3M (nyse: MMM - news - people ) has with Scotchgard and Intel (nasdaq: INTC - news - people ) with PCs.
